title: Doff Advanced Concentrated Weedkiller 10 x 80ml sachets
features: Kills weeds and roots in and around your garden.
Easy to use, simply mix the sachet with water. For use and application in sprayers or watering cans.
Systemic weed killer for the control of annual and deep rooted perennial weeds.
Leaves no residual active ingredient in the soil, planting can take place as soon as weeds have died back.
Each sachet can treat up to 32 meters squared. Contains Glyphosate.
description: Product Description Doff Advanced Concentrated Weedkiller is a systemic weed killer for the control of annual and deep-rooted perennial weeds, including grasses, docks, nettles, willow herb, dandelion and many more. Systemic Weedkillers are those that are absorbed through the leaf and into the weed's sap stream to be transported to all growing points, including the roots and therefore killing the weed. Contains 90 g/l Gyphosate in a soluble solution. Directions Dilute concentrate as directed and apply using a sprayer on unwanted vegetation on paths, patios, drives and wastelands. Safety Warning Harmful if swallowed or inhaled. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Wear protective clothing and gloves when handling. Do not ingest or inhale. Use in a well-ventilated area. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and direct sunlight. Do not dispose of in the environment. Consult a specialist/doctor in case of accidental exposure. See more
